name: Sivakumar Dhanasekar
role: Lead Software Engineer and Enterprise Architect
bio: Sivakumar Dhanasekar is a software engineering leader and enterprise architect with more than two decades of experience building enterprise-scale applications across financial technology, retail, identity, fraud, and supply-chain domains.
His work focuses on AI-driven, cloud-native, and data-centric platforms that combine secure architecture, scalable microservices, API orchestration, and practical automation.

At Equifax, he leads digital transformation initiatives for identity and fraud services, including AI-based solutions for device reputation, fraud risk scoring, trust scoring, and verification confidence.
